name: ultrapower
description: Ultrapower — a codebase companion for Claude Code: CodeGraph-aware, guards architecture debt, ceremony scaled to blast radius.

plugins.name: ultrapower
plugins.description: A codebase companion: understands the project, remembers done/doing/next, pushes back on debt before it is written (hard architecture guard), and ships lean, verified code. Auto CodeGraph lifecycle; ceremony scaled to blast radius.
